title: Write agent prompts: elicitation, review, compliance, maintenance
description: Starter prompts for the four agents: Intent Elicitation Agent, Intent Review Agent, Compliance Agent, Intent Maintenance Agent. Each prompt should be usable as a system prompt and include guidance on what the agent produces and what it flags.

title: Define workflow: stages, gates, and handoffs
description: Document the governed workflow analogous to Gitflow. Stages: intent authoring, elicitation review, stakeholder review, engineering review, approval, code generation, compliance check. Include a diagram and written description of gates between stages.

title: Write README
description: Cover: the problem, the methodology, how this differs from existing approaches (spec-driven dev, CIRs, IDD). Should be usable as the public landing page when the repo goes public.
